evals.prompt:
請幫我根據以下病人資料，生成一份住院 admission note 的 Word 檔：

病人姓名：王美玲
MRN：A109876
生日：1972-07-25（年齡 53 歲）
性別：女
入院日期：2026-04-06
主治醫師：Dr. Chang Hsiao-Lin

主訴 (CC)：右下腹疼痛 2 天，伴噁心嘔吐

HPI：53 歲女性，右下腹疼痛漸進性加重 2 天，VAS 7/10，噁心嘔吐 3 次，發燒 38.2°C。

PMH：Hypertension, Hyperlipidemia
PSH：Cesarean section x2
用藥：Amlodipine 10mg QD, Rosuvastatin 10mg QD
過敏：NKDA
家族史：母親大腸癌
社會史：不吸菸不飲酒，家庭主婦

生命徵象：T 38.2°C, HR 92, BP 128/82, RR 18, SpO2 98% RA, 體重 58kg

身體檢查：RLQ tenderness rebound+, McBurney+, Rovsing+

檢驗：WBC 15.8 (H), CRP 112 (H)
影像：腹部 CT：appendix 9.5mm fat stranding → acute appendicitis

A&P：
1. Acute appendicitis → 外科會診，腹腔鏡闌尾切除術
2. Fever → Cefazolin 1g IV q8h
3. HTN → continue Amlodipine
evals.expected_output: Formatted .docx admission note for Wang Mei-Ling with all standard sections
assertions: A .docx file is created and saved to disk
The document contains patient name Wang or Mei-Ling or 王美玲
The document contains sections for Chief Complaint HPI PMH Medications Allergies Vital Signs Physical Exam Labs and Assessment Plan
The Assessment and Plan section has numbered problems
The document title includes Admission Note
Patient demographics MRN DOB age gender appear in the document

evals.prompt: I have a patient CSV file. Please read it and generate an admission note Word document. File path: C:/Users/User/AppData/Roaming/Claude/local-agent-mode-sessions/skills-plugin/2a0ed962-b562-48ab-91f0-7c2722a6b7e9/eea8f95b-59bf-45be-b18b-060b61e7401f/skills/admission-note/evals/files/sample_patient_chen.csv
evals.expected_output: Formatted Word admission note for Chen Da-Ming extracted from CSV
assertions: A .docx file is created and saved to disk
The document contains patient name Chen or Da-Ming
The document includes COPD and pneumonia
All required clinical sections present
Penicillin allergy mentioned
Assessment and Plan has at least 2 numbered problems
Vital signs values present

evals.prompt:
幫我寫一份住院病歷 Word 檔。病人：林志偉，男，58歲，MRN: C334512。入院日 2026-04-06，主治 Dr. Wu Jian-Ming 心臟科。

CC：胸痛冷汗 4 小時
HPI：突發壓迫性胸痛放射左臂，伴冷汗呼吸困難
PMH：DM T2, Dyslipidemia
PSH：無
藥物：Metformin 1000mg BID, Rosuvastatin 20mg QD
過敏：無
家族史：父親 62 歲心肌梗塞
社會史：吸菸 30 year pack-years

Vitals: T 37, HR 98, BP 155/95, RR 20, SpO2 96%
PE: S3 gallop，無 murmur，無下肢水腫
ECG: ST elevation II III aVF inferior MI
Troponin I 12.8 (H), CK-MB 85 (H)

A&P:
1. Acute inferior STEMI → emergent PCI, Aspirin 325mg + Ticagrelor 180mg
2. HTN → Lisinopril 5mg QD
3. DM → stop Metformin, sliding scale insulin
4. Dyslipidemia → Atorvastatin 80mg QD
evals.expected_output: Professional Word admission note for Lin Zhi-Wei STEMI with 4 problems in A&P
assertions: A .docx file is created and saved to disk
Document contains patient name Lin or Zhi-Wei or 林志偉
STEMI or myocardial infarction mentioned
ECG findings ST elevation mentioned
Assessment Plan includes PCI or cardiac intervention
All standard admission note sections present
Troponin or cardiac enzyme values in labs section
